summary: Plan for harness update CLI command with PM detection, version pinning, and post-update slash command regeneration
pending: Task 1: Create update command with PM detection, version check, and update logic
Task 2: Add tests for update command utilities
Task 3: Register update command in CLI program
concerns: Package manager detection heuristic may miss edge cases (Volta, asdf shims) — npm fallback mitigates
decisions: Shell out to user's package manager rather than downloading binaries
Auto-detect PM from binary symlink path, fall back to npm
Update all @harness-engineering/* packages, not just CLI
Interactive prompt for slash command regeneration
Support --version flag for pinning, default to latest
Single command file, no premature abstraction
